# Cookie

## Tags
biscuit, privacy, legal, food

## Categories
account, food-beverage

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/cookie)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Cookie;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Cookie { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
